{{Quote|>BBZZK< -- This is Clone Commander CR57. We're taking heavy fire on the southern perimeter. Sephi forces are detonating -- >KSSSHH< >BBZZK< -- -ey're wiping us out! >BBKKHH<|CR57's last message on Thustra|<ref name="Jedi: Yoda" />}}
'''CR57''' was a [[Clone Commander/Legends|clone trooper commander]] who served in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], CR57 was part of a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] task force sent to bring the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Thustra/Legends|Thustra]] back into the Republic camp. However, shortly after the [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] and his [[Clone trooper/Legends|troops]] landed, the [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] [[Sephi/Legends|Sephi]] [[Battle of Thustra|attacked]] the Republic forces, and CR57 was [[Death/Legends|killed]].

==Biography==
CR57 was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Clone Commander/Legends|clone trooper commander]]<ref name="Jedi: Yoda" /> who was one of the many [[Cloning/Legends|clones]]<ref name="SWE" /> of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].<ref name="clone troopers" /> The [[Commander/Legends|commander]]<ref name="Jedi: Yoda" /> was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] and trained on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]<ref name="SWE" /> to fight in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="clone troopers" /> In [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]],<ref name="Date" /> the planet [[Thustra/Legends|Thustra]] decided to secede from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. CR57 was part of a strike force led by [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi Generals]] [[Tyr]] and [[Tyffix]] that was tasked with landing on Thustra and making a show of force that would bring the [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] [[Sephi/Legends|Sephi]] back into the Republic camp.<ref name="Jedi: Yoda" />

However, Sephi [[Trooper/Legends|troops]] [[Battle of Thustra|attacked]] the Republic task force shortly after it landed on Thustra. CR57 commanded the [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] on the southern perimeter during the battle. The Republic clone forces there came under heavy fire from Sephi troops, who overwhelmed them. CR57 was [[Death/Legends|killed]] while reporting his status over [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] to the rest of the Republic forces.<ref name="Jedi: Yoda" />

==Personality and traits==
When Sephi troops overran CR57's position, the commander informed the other parts of the Republic [[Army/Legends|army]] about his status until he was killed.<ref name="Jedi: Yoda" /> Like all [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]],<ref name="SWE" /> he stood 1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall.<ref name="clone troopers" />

==Behind the scenes==
CR57's voice appeared in ''[[Jedi: Yoda]]'', a [[Star Wars comic books|comic-book]] written by [[Jeremy Barlow]] and published by [[Dark Horse Comics]]<ref name="Jedi: Yoda" /> on [[July 21]], [[2004]].<ref name="Marvel">{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54285/star_wars_jedi_-_yoda_2004_1|text=Star Wars: Jedi - Yoda (2004) #1}}</ref>
